steps.t: Strider has bested the brigand guards, but he warns there are more enemies ahead. The Ranger wants you to practice combat by sparring with him to ensu…
Now that you have practiced combat, speak with Strider and find out what to do next.
Strider has left the jailhouse and entered the yard. He is waiting for you there.
Now that you have left the jailhouse, speak with Stider and find out where to go next.
Celandine is being held in a cage against the wall of the enclosure. You have defeated Celandine's captors, but you have not found Mundo Sackville-Bag…
Mundo is tied to a post in the yard. Despite the defeat of his captor, Mundo Sackville-Baggins appears particularly displeased. You should encourage h…
Strider and Amdir await you and the hobbits at the main gate. You have freed both of the missing hobbits, but you have not yet escaped the camp.
Amdir lies just beyond the main gate. The Ranger Amdir was struck down by the Black Rider before Strider could drive him off. You should ask Strider w…
Strider waits near the main gate. Amdir is gravely wounded. Strider will best know what to do to help his friend.
